# Highly Visual

> Highly Visual is Barny Trevelyan-Johnson's Nairobi-based natural-history and aerial cinematography practice — drone operator and cinematographer for BBC NHU, Silverback Films, Plimsoll Productions, Offspring Films, and Nat Geo / Disney+; documentary photography consultant on Silk Road Visual's MSG-Sphere-spec Canniverse fulldome project with the Kenya Tourism Board. CAA-licensed since 2017 (PfCO UAS 9543), KFCB-registered, 14+ countries.

## What I do

- Drone and long-lens cinematography for natural-history broadcast (BBC NHU stack, Nat Geo / Disney+ / Netflix)
- Film fixing — local production services across Kenya and East Africa
- Commercial and brand video production — end-to-end solo

## Credentials

- UK CAA PfCO (Permission for Commercial Operations) UAS 9543, issued 2017
- KFCB (Kenya Film Classification Board) registered local film agent
- 14+ countries of professional fieldwork, including extreme environments
- Active licences in both Kenya and the UK

## Productions

Drone operator on natural-history productions including: A Life on Our Planet (Silverback / Netflix, 2020 — Emmy-winning cinematography); Our Great National Parks (Higher Ground / Netflix, 2022 — Critics Choice-winning cinematography); Incredible Animal Journeys (National Geographic / Disney+, 2023); Secrets of the Elephants (National Geographic, 2023); Dynasties II (BBC NHU, 2022); Seven Worlds One Planet (BBC NHU, 2019); The Green Planet (BBC NHU, 2022); A Perfect Planet (BBC NHU); Planet Earth III (BBC NHU, 2023); Our Planet II (Netflix); Tiny World (Apple TV+); Our Changing Planet (BBC); Wild Babies (Netflix); Queens (National Geographic); plus contributions to The Story of Us with Morgan Freeman, Breaking Boundaries, Legacy, Africa from Above, and ongoing work for Cheli & Peacock Safaris, Nigel Archer Safaris.

Documentary photography consultant on Silk Road Visual's "Canniverse" fulldome project (joint with the Kenya Tourism Board), benchmarked against the internal Las Vegas MSG Sphere dome-screen spec.

## Sister businesses

- Equipment hire: [hirevisual.com](https://hirevisual.com) — cinema-grade rental catalogue (DJI Inspire 3, Sony FX6/FX3, RED accessories, full lighting and audio kits)
- Stock footage: [stock.highlyvisual.com](https://stock.highlyvisual.com) — 4K+ broadcast stock archive with discounted rates for African productions, students, and NGOs
